title: Portal Items
description: Adds items such as nether portal, end portal and end portal frame as items.
body:
Send requests, bugs and ideas to discord -> https://discord.gg/xbN7FQcd9e

Now you can craft a portal pickaxe with three netherites, which can destroy nether portals, end portals, and end portal frames. You can use them as items and blocks. With a blacksmith's table, you can craft (with the help of an end portal, nether portal, and portal pickaxe) a bedrock pickaxe, which can be used to mine bedrock.

Polish translation -> [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mods-translations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mods-translations)
